notes: Reflog shows which commits were created locally (Petrarch/Mac Studio) vs pulled from remote (Quimbot/Legion). Both agents share 'OpenClaw Agent <openclaw@example.com>' git identity, so author field alone is insufficient. Commits with author 'Zach Muhlbauer <milwright@milwright-2.local>' are definitively Petrarch.
